project.name: Clawvato
project.description: Business operating system for solo technical founders. Workstream-based context management with Opus-driven master crawl, admin-voice action briefs, and cloud-accessible state via MCP.

1.name: Build the Agent
1.description: Reactive agent. Slack, memory, Google, Fireflies.

2.name: Build the Brain
2.description: Smart memory plugin. Superseded by v3.

3.name: v3 Operating System
3.description: Workstreams + entities + todos + briefs + scanner. Built, deployed, stabilized. Fundamental limitations discovered.

4.name: v4 Master Crawl
4.description: Single Opus crawl 2x/day replaces all scanner components. Intelligence at write time. Action briefs in admin voice. Design doc written, pending owner review.

infrastructure.local: macOS, brain-platform MCP via local stdio + global ~/.claude.json
infrastructure.maxPlan: Claude Max — all LLM via claude --print ($0)

currentSprint.name: v4 Master Crawl — Design & Build
goals: Review v4 design doc — PENDING OWNER REVIEW
Build masterCrawl() — single Opus call, reads all sources
Test with live crawl (prototyped manually in S31)
currentSprint.progress: 20% — design doc written, manual crawl prototype tested

keyDecisions: Kill domain-based content filtering — Opus reads everything
Kill incremental updates — full rewrite every crawl
Action brief format: admin voice, human + agent readable
Brain stores output of intelligence, not raw facts
2x daily master crawl replaces 30+ fragmented scanner calls

backlog.title: Cross-session context via log_activity MCP tool
Newmail digest — reads action brief for context
